scripts.dev: yarn setup && yarn seed && yarn build:deps && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "yarn workspace @btl/server dev" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:3001 && yarn workspace @btl/web dev"
scripts.tsc: yarn workspaces foreach -Apt --exclude break-the-loop run typecheck
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspaces foreach -Apt --exclude break-the-loop run typecheck
